Class JobDeviceFilters.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite.Builder
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage.Builder<JobDeviceFilters.Builder>
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<JobDeviceFilters.Builder>
org.tensorflow.proto.JobDeviceFilters.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Message.Builder, MessageLite.Builder, MessageLiteOrBuilder, MessageOrBuilder, Cloneable, JobDeviceFiltersOrBuilder
Enclosing class:
JobDeviceFilters
public static final class JobDeviceFilters.Builder extends GeneratedMessage.Builder<JobDeviceFilters.Builder> implements JobDeviceFiltersOrBuilder
Defines the device filters for tasks in a job.
Protobuf type tensorflow.JobDeviceFilters
